description: Your personal flag queue — manually capture items across Gmail, HubSpot, Slack, Notion, InFlow, etc. that need follow-up but don't fit into an automated workflow. Grouped by platform, then by skill, so you can batch-action similar items.
flaggedCriteria: Local only — items you add here. Persists in browser localStorage under db-manual-flags. Not synced to HubSpot.
summary: Add a manual flag to capture anything that needs follow-up.
